button.label: About
button.supertip: Displays information about Inspector Mike 2.0 Utilities. You may be prompted to allow Excel to open a local HTML file.

button.label: Backup
button.supertip: Saves the current workbook and creates a timestamped backup copy in an Archive folder next to the original file.

button.label: Save As...
button.supertip: Opens the classic Windows Save As dialog (not the OneDrive version).

button.label: Export As CSV
button.supertip: Exports the active worksheet as a CSV file in the same folder as the workbook, with the sheet name appended to the filename.

button.label: Export As PDF
button.supertip: Exports the active worksheet to PDF using current print settings, saved in the same folder as the workbook.

button.label: Compare Worksheets
button.supertip: Opens a dialog that allows you to choose the two worksheets for comparision. A new worksheet is then created comparing the two.

menu.label: Format Text
menu.supertip: Updates the case of the selected text to the chosen format (uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case)

button.label: Title Case
button.supertip: Convert selected cells to Title Case.

button.label: Sentence case
button.supertip: Convert selected cells to Sentence case.

button.label: Configure
button.supertip: Opens a dialog that allows you to configure Excel for use as an Eventing system or as a Logging system, or both

button.label: Insert Time
button.supertip: Inserts date and/or time values for logging. Behaviour depends on available columns (Date, Time, DateTime, Start/End variants).

button.label: Event Launcher
button.supertip: Displays all configured events. Selecting an event inserts its data into the worksheet. Creates the event sheet if it does not exist.

button.label: Add/Edit Event
button.supertip: Opens the event form for the current sheet. Edits the selected row if data exists, otherwise adds a new entry.

button.label: Basic Table Tidy
button.supertip: Formats the worksheet as a table: freezes header row, applies default font, and enables filtering.

button.label: Format Standard Columns
button.supertip: Applies formatting based on recognised column names (e.g. Date, Time, KP, Easting etc).

button.label: Rename Columns
button.supertip: Create and apply column name mappings. Supports bidirectional renaming and creation of missing columns.

button.label: Interpolate Time Based Data
button.screentip: Interpolate data to a 3 second interval
button.supertip: Ensures a maximum 3-second interval between rows. Requires Date/Time or DateTime columns.. Numeric fields are interpolated; other fields are copied.
